title: Hot Wheels Elite 1:43 Scale
summary: This is a 1:43 scale series of Hot Wheels cars under the Hot Wheels Elite branding produced from 2008 to 2015. Most castings from 2008 to 2011 have a limited production run of between 5,000 and 10,000.

title: Hot Wheels Elite
